## Problem

(What problem are you trying to solve? Whose problem is it?)

## Proposed solution

(What you'd like to see. A rough API sketch is welcome if relevant.)

(Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better.)

## Compatibility & versioning

(Would this be a breaking change? Does it require a profile schema bump or API version change?)

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within persona-hub's stated scope (SDK + thin persistence API for persona evaluation)
- [ ] This does NOT belong in a separate tool (auth, generic event collection, UI builder — see [README](../../README.md#what-persona-hub-is-not))
